scripts.purge: rm -Rf node_modules package-lock.json ios android && clear && echo '🗑️ Project purged successfully'
scripts.restart:ios: npm run purge && npm install && npx expo prebuild -p ios --clean && npx pod-install && npm run ios
scripts.restart:android: npm run purge && npm install && npx expo prebuild -p android --clean && npx pod-install && npm run android
